title: RFID Lecturers Dashboard
blurb: RFID-enabled lecturer portal designed to scan student RFID tags and instantly retrieve student profiles, log class attendance, and support academic record tracking (attendance history, exam records, and course-related data). Includes authentication (register/login) and a structured dashboard flow, with backend/database integration in progress.

title: AI-Buddy
blurb: Interactive AI learning platform for elementary students, combining gamified education, quizzes, and machine learning demonstrations. Built with Flask (Python) backend and TensorFlow/Keras integration, featuring a child-focused, accessible UI.
